description:
VREMENSKE OZNAKE:
00:00 Uvod
05:40 O Epsteinu, kompaniji i njihovim gnusobama
32:01 O pobačaju (koji je i dalje ubojstvo)
38:57 O korizmi, postu i odricanju
57:02 O HOS-ovim stanovima i drugim aktualnostima

SNIMATELJ I MONTAŽER:
Igor Vuk | Wolf Media

U EPIZODI SUDJELUJU:
Stanko Stojić https://instagram.com/stanco_stoich/ 
Ante Vlašić (Cash) https://instagram.com/antecash/ 
Marin Periš https://instagram.com/peris.marin17/
Matej Sunara https://instagram.com/matejsunara/ 

HVALA NAŠIM PATRONIMA I SPONZORIMA:
Angellum https://instagram.com/angellum_hr/ 
Cristero Pub https://instagram.com/cristeropub/ 
Sofascore https://instagram.com/sofascore_hrvatska/ 
Kedo https://instagram.com/kedo_doo/ 
Inovapro https://solarnakarta.hr 
Shoetique https://instagram.com/shoetiquecroatia/ 
Verbum https://instagram.com/verbum.hr/ 
Prima namještaj https://instagram.com/prima_namjestaj/
